title: The Crew Is Scattered: Turning Point
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Pacifista, Brook, Whitebeard, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #2 as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Pacifista, Brook, Whitebeard, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, focusing on the immediate stakes of the crew is scattered: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Z-Z-Z-ZORO!! zoro got hit by a beam!!!

dialogue.speaker: Pacifista
dialogue.text: So you're finally here, Uncle Kizaru...

dialogue.speaker: Pacifista
dialogue.text: It's already too late for you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Go ahead and rest for a while.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This is bad!!! Zoro's in danger!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Damn it!!! Why!!? Nothing hits him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Pacifista
dialogue.text: No! He's already at his limits!!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: So, you're making an appear- once...?
